slogans: Type is Late — voice is the future
Too tired to type? Just speak it
Speak your mind, skip the keyboard

about.title: About TypeLate
about.description: Hands off the keyboard — your voice types straight to the cursor. TypeLate is an open-source desktop speech-to-text tool, licensed under MIT.
about.author: Author:

hotkey.title: Hotkey Settings
hotkey.systemKeyHint: For Fn, media keys, etc., use Preset mode
hotkey.holdDescription: Hold to record, release to stop
hotkey.toggleDescription: Press once to start, press again to stop
hotkey.doubleTapDescription: Double-tap to start recording, tap once to stop. Prevents accidental triggers.

provider.title: AI Provider
provider.description: Choose which AI service to use for transcription and enhancement.
provider.groqDescription: Free tier with fast inference. Best for getting started.

apiKey.title: Groq API Key
apiKey.instruction: Generate an API Key in Groq Console and paste it here.
apiKey.instructionTemplate: Generate an API Key in {provider} Console and paste it here.
apiKey.onboarding: Welcome to TypeLate! Please set up your Groq API Key to enable voice input.
apiKey.onboardingTemplate: Welcome to TypeLate! Please set up your {provider} API Key to enable voice input.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive Sync
googleDrive.description: Sync your custom vocabulary across devices using Google Drive.

model.title: Model Selection
model.description: Choose the AI models for speech transcription and text enhancement. Faster models respond quicker, while larger models offer better quality.

prompt.title: AI Enhancement Prompt
prompt.description: Choose an enhancement mode or customize your prompt.
prompt.aiToggleDescription: Process transcription with AI before pasting
prompt.modeNoneDescription: Paste the raw transcription without any AI processing
prompt.modeMinimalDescription: Correct errors and add punctuation while preserving your original phrasing
prompt.modeActiveDescription: Restructure into clear paragraphs and lists for easier reading

threshold.title: Short Text Threshold
threshold.description: When enabled, transcriptions below the specified character count will skip AI enhancement and paste the raw text directly. When disabled, AI enhancement is always applied.

app.title: Application
app.muteDescription: Automatically mute system speakers when recording starts, and restore when finished
app.soundFeedbackDescription: Play sound effects when recording starts, stops, or encounters an error
app.soundPresetDescription: Choose a built-in sound theme or set custom sounds
app.autoStartDescription: Automatically start TypeLate when you log in

successDisplayDuration.label: Result display duration
successDisplayDuration.description: How long the transcription result stays visible

copyResultToClipboard.label: Copy result to clipboard
copyResultToClipboard.description: Enable to paste the result again from clipboard
copyResultToClipboard.enabled: Transcription result will be copied to clipboard
copyResultToClipboard.disabled: Transcription result will not be copied to clipboard

recording.title: Recording Storage
recording.description: Recording files are saved to disk after transcription. You can play them back in history or use them for re-transcription.
recording.retentionPolicyDescription: How long to keep recording files on disk
recording.retentionNoneDescription: Recording files will be deleted after transcription
recording.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all saved recording files. History records will be preserved, but playback will no longer be available.

permissions.title: App Permissions
permissions.subtitle: TypeLate requires the following permissions to function properly
permissions.nonMacNote: Permission management is primarily a macOS feature. On other platforms these checks will always report granted.

keyboard.title: Keyboard Shortcut
keyboard.description: Set up a keyboard shortcut to trigger TypeLate anywhere

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Allow TypeLate to record your voice for transcription

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Allow TypeLate to paste transcribed text directly at your cursor position

smartDictionary.title: Smart Dictionary Learning
smartDictionary.description: Auto-detect corrections after paste and learn new terms via AI analysis
smartDictionary.privacyNote: When enabled, the system reads text near the cursor for AI analysis. No original text is stored
smartDictionary.analysisModelDescription: AI model for determining whether corrected terms should be added to the dictionary (independent from text enhancement model)

contextAware.title: Context-Aware Enhancement
contextAware.description: Automatically adjust tone based on the active app (formal for email, casual for chat, technical for IDE)

dashboard.emptyState: Start using voice input and your stats will appear here

apiKeyMissing.title: Set up your API Key to get started
apiKeyMissing.description: TypeLate needs an API Key for voice transcription and AI enhancement.

dashboard.communityDescription: Got ideas? Report bugs or request features
dashboard.heroEmptyDescription: Start using voice input to see your speed advantage

vocabulary.title: Custom Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Add industry terms and names to boost recognition accuracy

customPrompt.title: AI Enhancement Prompt
customPrompt.description: Customize how AI processes and formats your speech

hotkeyModes.title: Hotkey Modes
hotkeyModes.description: Choose Hold, Toggle, or Double-Tap recording triggers

historyPlayback.title: Recording Playback
historyPlayback.description: Replay past recordings and re-transcribe with different settings

smartDictionary.title: Smart Dictionary
smartDictionary.description: AI auto-learns new terms from your corrections after paste

soundThemes.title: Sound Themes
soundThemes.description: Customize recording start/stop sounds with built-in themes

history.emptyState: No transcriptions yet. Start using voice input!

retryFailed.noAudioFile: Audio file is not available — cannot retry.
retryFailed.apiKeyMissing: API key is missing. Please configure it in Settings and try again.
retryFailed.emptyResult: Transcription returned empty. The audio may be too quiet or unintelligible.
retryFailed.transcriptionFailed: Retry failed. Check your API key, network, or quota and try again.

vocabAnalysis.apiKeyRequired: Please set up your API Key in Settings first

dictionary.emptyState: No custom terms yet. Add frequently used terms to improve recognition accuracy
dictionary.description: Dictionary terms are provided to the AI during speech recognition to improve accuracy for proper nouns and technical terms.
dictionary.weightDescription: During each speech recognition, the top {limit} terms by weight are included in the AI recognition prompt. When the AI detects you repeatedly correcting the same term, its weight increases automatically.
dictionary.noAiSuggestions: No AI suggestions yet. Enable Smart Dictionary Learning to auto-learn new terms

textAnalyzer.title: Text Vocabulary Analyzer
textAnalyzer.description: Paste text or upload a file, and AI will extract domain-specific terms for your dictionary.
textAnalyzer.placeholder: Paste your text here (meeting notes, articles, documentation...)
textAnalyzer.noTermsFound: No suitable terms found in this text
textAnalyzer.noTextProvided: Please paste text or upload a file first
textAnalyzer.apiKeyRequired: Please set up your API Key in Settings first
textAnalyzer.urlPlaceholder: Enter a URL to extract text from...
textAnalyzer.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
textAnalyzer.urlPreviewTruncated: Content is long — only first {limit} characters will be analyzed ({percent}%)

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.folderHint: Pick a folder synced by iCloud Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, or Google Drive.
cloudSync.disconnectDescription: Your vocabulary file will remain in the sync folder. You can reconnect at any time.
cloudSync.advancedHint: Connect directly via Google Drive API. Requires setting up a Google Cloud project.

googleDrive.title: Google Drive Sync
googleDrive.description: Sync your vocabulary across devices via Google Drive
googleDrive.authExpired: Session expired. Please reconnect Google Drive.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Permission Required
accessibility.description: TypeLate needs Accessibility permission to listen for global hotkeys. Without it, the hotkey feature will not work.
accessibility.step1: Click the button below to open System Settings.
accessibility.step2: Find TypeLate in the list and enable it.
accessibility.step3: Return to the app. It will automatically detect and activate.
accessibility.reinitializeError: Failed to reinitialize hotkey. Please restart the application.
accessibility.staleEntryHint: Already ticked but still not working? Select TypeLate in the list, click the "−" button to remove it, then re-add it via the button above. macOS ties Accessibility permission to the previous version's code signature, so upgrades require re-adding the entry.

voiceFlow.correctionPromptHint: Copy the correct term (⌘C) to add

errors.databaseInitFailed: Database initialization failed. History is temporarily unavailable. Please restart the app.
errors.apiKeyInvalidFormat: API Key should start with gsk_

mic.permission: Microphone permission is required to record
mic.busy: Microphone is in use by another application

transcription.invalidAudio: Invalid audio format or incomplete recording data
transcription.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired
transcription.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later

enhancement.timeout: AI enhancement timed out. Raw text pasted instead
enhancement.modelDecommissioned: This model has been decommissioned. Please switch to another model in Settings
enhancement.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired
enhancement.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later
enhancement.badRequest: Model request error. Please check your settings

hotkey.conflictWarning: This key ({displayName}) may conflict with system shortcuts. Consider choosing a different key
hotkey.capslockWarning: CapsLock may be unstable in Hold mode on macOS. Consider using Toggle mode or choosing a different key
hotkey.presetHint: This key is available in Preset mode. Consider switching to Preset mode
hotkey.recordingTimeout: No key detected. Some system keys (Fn, media keys) cannot be recorded. Please use Preset mode.
hotkey.keycodeCollision: This key shares the same keycode as {target} on macOS. Both will trigger simultaneously
hotkey.escReserved: ESC is reserved as the global abort key and cannot be used as a trigger key

onboarding.providerSelectDescription: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.apiKeyTitle: Step 2: Get a Groq API Key
onboarding.apiKeyStep1: Click the button below to open Groq Console
onboarding.apiKeyStep2: Sign up or log in (Google account works)
onboarding.apiKeyStep3: Click "Create API Key", copy the key starting with gsk_
onboarding.apiKeyStep4: Come back here and paste it in the next step
onboarding.pasteKeyDescription: Paste the key you copied from Groq Console
onboarding.hotkeyDescription: Press once to start recording, press again to stop and transcribe.
onboarding.hotkeyCustomize: You can customize this later in Settings.
onboarding.trialInstruction: Click the box, press Fn to start recording, press again to stop.
onboarding.trialPlaceholder: Press Fn and speak — text will appear here...
onboarding.trialExample: Try saying "The weather is nice today"
onboarding.trialSuccess: It works! You've got the hang of it.
onboarding.micDescription: Let's make sure your microphone is working.
onboarding.micSpeakNow: Say something to test your microphone
onboarding.doneDescription: Press your hotkey anytime to start dictating. TypeLate will transcribe and paste the text automatically.

mobileApp.title: Try TypeLate on Mobile
mobileApp.description: Scan the QR code to visit the TypeLate website and get the mobile app.

update.installFailed: Installation failed. Please download the update manually
update.checkFailed: Check failed. Please verify your network connection
update.autoInstallDescription: TypeLate v{version} has been downloaded. The application will restart after installation.
update.newVersionDescription: TypeLate v{version} is available. Click Start Update to download and restart the application automatically.

updateDialog.title: A new version of TypeLate is available!
updateDialog.versionComparison: TypeLate {newVersion} is now available — you have {currentVersion}.

upgradeNotice.title: TypeLate Update Summary
upgradeNotice.item1: 1. Security fix: microphone stays active after stopping recording on macOS when a specific device is selected — now fixed
upgradeNotice.item2: 2. Microphone selection: choose your input device in settings
upgradeNotice.item3: 3. Improved soft speech detection: peak energy escape hatch reduces false positives
upgradeNotice.item4: 4. More stable AI enhancement: lower randomness, auto-retry on anomalous results
upgradeNotice.item5: 5. AI enhancement preserves tone: questions are no longer rewritten as statements
